'''Jugsmuk Station''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located adjacent to the settlement of [[Jugsmuk]] on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. It was constructed of prefabricated buildings. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Jugsmuk Station included the [[Irrational Number]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], [[Sheebareevadee's Emporium of Interstellar Goods]], and [[Momma Reseros' Diner]]. At Jugsmuk Station, offworlders could live out of the way of the native [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]].<ref name="MS" />
